all.title: Creators on Stream Archive — Record & Download Live Streams
all.description: Browse creators on Stream Archive. Add your favourites and their live streams are recorded automatically. Record and download TikTok, Twitch, YouTube, Bigo, Tango, Kick, and more.

tiktok.title: TikTok Creators — Record & Download TikTok Lives
tiktok.description: Browse TikTok creators on Stream Archive. Add your favourites and their TikTok Lives are recorded automatically. TikTok live recorder — download TikTok live recordings without screen capture.

faqs.question: How do I start recording TikTok Lives on Stream Archive?
faqs.answer: Sign up for a free account and add the TikTok username of any creator you want to follow. From that moment, every TikTok Live they broadcast is recorded automatically by the cloud-based TikTok live recorder. No screen capture app needed and no device left running.

faqs.question: Can I rewatch TikTok Lives that already ended?
faqs.answer: Yes. Once a TikTok creator is added to your account, all their Lives are recorded and stored in your library. You can rewatch any TikTok live recording at any time, even months after the original broadcast ended.

faqs.question: Do I need a screen capture tool for TikTok?
faqs.answer: No. Screen capture apps for TikTok are unreliable and produce low quality footage. Stream Archive records TikTok Lives server-side in the cloud, which gives you high quality recordings with no app to install and no black screen issues.

faqs.question: Can I download TikTok live recordings from Stream Archive?
faqs.answer: Yes. Premium members can download any TikTok live recording as a full video file with no watermark. Free users can stream all recordings through the built-in browser player.

faqs.question: How many TikTok creators can I follow?
faqs.answer: Free users can add up to 3 creators. Premium users can follow up to 100 creators across all supported platforms, so you can record TikTok Lives alongside streams from other platforms in one library.

twitch.title: Twitch Creators — Record Twitch Streams & Download VODs
twitch.description: Browse Twitch creators on Stream Archive. Add your favourites and their streams are recorded automatically. Twitch stream recorder and Twitch VOD downloader — recordings that never expire.

faqs.question: How do I record Twitch streams on Stream Archive?
faqs.answer: Sign up for a free account and add any Twitch username. Every time that streamer goes live, the cloud-based Twitch stream recorder captures the full broadcast. No OBS, no desktop app, no browser running in the background.

faqs.question: Do Twitch VODs expire on Stream Archive?
faqs.answer: No. Twitch deletes its own VODs after 14 to 60 days, but recordings on Stream Archive are kept permanently. You can watch or download Twitch VODs from your library no matter how old they are.

faqs.question: Can I use Stream Archive as a Twitch VOD downloader?
faqs.answer: Yes. Premium members can download any Twitch stream recording as a video file with a single click. It works as a built-in Twitch VOD downloader without the need for third-party tools that constantly break.

faqs.question: Can I record streams from any Twitch category?
faqs.answer: Yes. Gaming, Just Chatting, IRL, music, creative content, and every other Twitch category is recorded automatically. The Twitch stream recorder does not filter by content type.

faqs.question: Is it free to record Twitch streams?
faqs.answer: Yes. Create a free account and start recording Twitch streams immediately. Premium plans unlock the ability to download Twitch VODs as video files and provide extended storage for your library.

youtube.title: YouTube Creators — Record & Download YouTube Live Streams
youtube.description: Browse YouTube creators on Stream Archive. Add your favourite channels and their YouTube Lives are recorded automatically. YouTube live recorder — download live stream recordings even when replays fail.

faqs.question: How do I record YouTube live streams?
faqs.answer: Add any YouTube channel on Stream Archive and every live broadcast is recorded automatically in the cloud. The YouTube live recorder runs around the clock, so you do not need to be online when the stream happens. Recordings appear in your library as soon as the broadcast ends.

faqs.question: Why use Stream Archive instead of YouTube replays?
faqs.answer: YouTube replays frequently fail to process, get deleted by creators, or go private without notice. Stream Archive records YouTube live streams independently, so your recordings exist regardless of what happens on YouTube. Think of it as a reliable backup you can always download.

faqs.question: Can I download YouTube live recordings?
faqs.answer: Yes. Premium members can download any YouTube live recording as a video file for offline viewing. Free users can stream all recordings through the browser player.

faqs.question: Is it free to start recording YouTube Lives?
faqs.answer: Yes. Sign up free and add your favourite YouTube channels. Every live broadcast is recorded automatically and available to watch in your library. Upgrade to premium when you want to download YouTube live stream recordings.

about.all:
## Your Favourite Creators, All in One Library

Live streaming is scattered across dozens of platforms, and keeping up with every creator you follow is a full-time job. Different time zones, overlapping schedules, and streams that vanish the moment they end all work against you. Stream Archive brings everything together. Add your favourite creators from any supported platform and their live streams are recorded automatically in the cloud. No more missed broadcasts, no more expired VODs, no more scrambling to find a replay.

### Add a Creator, Start Recording

Paste any creator's profile URL and Stream Archive begins monitoring for live broadcasts. When they go live on TikTok, Twitch, YouTube, Bigo, Tango, Kick, AfreecaTV, or Pandalive, recording starts immediately. The entire process is automatic — you do not need to be online, and there is no software to run on your end.

### Your Library Grows While You Sleep

Every recorded broadcast is stored in your personal library. Watch recordings instantly through the built-in player or download them as video files with a premium account. Your library is searchable and organized by creator, platform, and date.

### One Place for Every Platform

Instead of managing separate tools for each streaming platform, Stream Archive handles TikTok live recording, Twitch stream recording, YouTube live recording, Bigo live recording, Tango stream recording, and more from a single dashboard. Add creators from any platform and everything ends up in the same library.

### No Screen Capture, No Extra Software

Stream Archive records streams in the cloud. There is no app to install, no screen capture software, no browser extension, and no device that needs to stay on. Recording happens server-side in high quality, regardless of your internet connection or device.

### Free to Get Started

Create an account and start following your favourite creators today. Recordings begin automatically the next time they go live.
about.tiktok:
## TikTok Creators on Stream Archive

TikTok has become one of the biggest live streaming platforms in the world, but it treats live content as completely disposable. When a TikTok Live ends, it is gone. There is no replay feature, no archive, no way to go back. For fans who follow creators across different time zones or who simply cannot watch every broadcast in real time, this means constantly missing content from people they care about.

Stream Archive changes that equation. It works as a TikTok live recorder that monitors your followed creators around the clock. The moment someone starts a TikTok Live, recording begins automatically in the cloud. When the broadcast ends, the full recording is stored in your library where you can watch it at your own pace or download it to keep.

### Why TikTok Lives Need to Be Recorded

Unlike YouTube or Twitch, TikTok offers zero replay functionality for live content. Creators cannot save their own Lives, and viewers cannot go back to watch something they missed. This makes TikTok Lives some of the most ephemeral content on the internet. A dedicated TikTok live recorder is the only way to preserve broadcasts that would otherwise disappear permanently.

### Discover and Follow TikTok Creators

Browse TikTok creators already being recorded on Stream Archive. See their recent Live recordings, check how often they stream, and add them to your follow list with one click. You can also add any TikTok creator by pasting their username, even if nobody else follows them on Stream Archive yet.

### No Phone Needed, No Screen Capture

Traditional methods of saving TikTok Lives involve screen recording on your phone, which drains battery, uses storage, produces low quality footage, and fails if you get a phone call. Stream Archive records TikTok Lives server-side, so you get high quality recordings without touching your phone.

### Free to Start

Sign up free, add your favourite TikTok creators, and their Lives are recorded automatically from that point on. Premium plans unlock the ability to download TikTok live recordings and provide extended storage.
about.twitch:
## Twitch Creators on Stream Archive

Twitch is the go-to platform for live streaming, but its VOD system has a well-known problem: expiration. Regular streamers lose their VODs after 14 days, and even Twitch Partners only get 60 days before recordings are wiped. Factor in DMCA muting, manual deletions by streamers, and the occasional Twitch outage, and relying on the platform to preserve streams is a gamble.

Stream Archive operates as an independent Twitch stream recorder. When you follow a Twitch creator, every broadcast is recorded in the cloud and stored permanently in your library. Recordings do not expire after 14 days, they are not subject to DMCA muting, and they remain available even if the streamer deletes their channel or Twitch removes the VOD.

### The Twitch VOD Problem

Twitch's VOD system was designed for short-term replays, not long-term preservation. Most viewers do not realize a favourite VOD has expired until they go looking for it and find it gone. Highlights help, but they require the streamer to manually clip them, and most streamers do not bother. A Twitch stream recorder that keeps recordings permanently solves this problem at the root.

### Built-In Twitch VOD Downloader

Downloading Twitch VODs through third-party tools is an exercise in frustration. Tools break after every Twitch update, require browser extensions, and often produce incomplete downloads. Stream Archive includes a built-in Twitch VOD downloader for premium users. Click download on any recording and get a complete video file.

### Discover Twitch Creators

Browse Twitch creators on Stream Archive, filter by category, and see their recent recordings. Follow new streamers and start building a library of their content. Whether they stream gaming, IRL, Just Chatting, or creative content, everything is recorded automatically.

### Free to Start

Create a free account and start following Twitch creators. Their streams are recorded automatically and stored in your library. Upgrade to premium for Twitch VOD downloads and extended storage.
about.youtube:
## YouTube Creators on Stream Archive

YouTube creators go live for product launches, Q&A sessions, gaming marathons, and community hangouts. But YouTube's live replay system is not as reliable as most people assume. Replays can take hours to process, fail to generate entirely, or get pulled down by the creator after the fact. Channels go private, videos get region-locked, and sometimes an entire channel disappears overnight.

Stream Archive provides a YouTube live recorder that works independently from YouTube's infrastructure. When you add a YouTube channel, every live broadcast is recorded in the cloud and stored in your library. If the YouTube replay fails, gets deleted, or goes private, your recording is still there.

### YouTube Replays Fail More Than You Think

Long streams are especially prone to replay processing failures on YouTube. Multi-hour broadcasts sometimes result in a broken replay or no replay at all. Stream Archive captures the full broadcast as it happens, so you get a complete recording regardless of what YouTube's system does afterward.

### Follow Your Favourite YouTube Channels

Browse YouTube creators already on Stream Archive. See their recorded Lives, check their streaming schedule, and add them to your library with one click. Add any YouTube channel by pasting the URL, and recording begins the next time they go live.

### Download YouTube Live Recordings

Premium members can download any YouTube live recording as a video file. Long streams, short streams, any length. Keep a local copy for offline viewing during travel or whenever you want it.

### Free to Start

Sign up free and add your favourite YouTube channels. Every live broadcast is recorded automatically and waiting in your library. Upgrade to premium to download YouTube live stream recordings.
about.kick:
## Kick Creators on Stream Archive

Kick is attracting a wave of creators looking for a new home, and the platform is growing fast. But growth also means you are constantly discovering new streamers, and it is impossible to watch every broadcast live. Stream Archive is a Kick stream recorder that captures every broadcast from the creators you follow, so you can catch up on your own time.

### Follow Kick Creators and Record Automatically

Add any Kick creator on Stream Archive and their streams are recorded automatically in the cloud. There is nothing to install, no software to configure, and no device that needs to stay on. Your library fills up with Kick recordings while you go about your day.

### Watch or Download Kick Recordings

Every Kick recording is available to stream instantly. Premium users can download Kick recordings as video files for offline viewing. Keep your favourite streams permanently in your library.

### Free to Start

Create a free account and start following your favourite Kick creators today.
about.pandalive:
## Pandalive Creators on Stream Archive

Pandalive is home to a vibrant community of Korean live streamers, but broadcasts disappear once they end. If you follow Pandalive creators from a different time zone, you are almost certainly missing streams on a regular basis. Stream Archive works as a Pandalive recorder that captures every broadcast automatically, so you can watch Korean live streams on your own schedule.

### Follow Pandalive Creators

Browse Pandalive creators already being recorded on Stream Archive. See their recent broadcasts, check how often they stream, and add them to your follow list. You can also add any Pandalive creator by pasting their username.

### Cloud-Based Pandalive Recorder

Recording happens entirely in the cloud. No desktop software, no browser extension, no device left running. Every Pandalive broadcast from your followed creators is captured and stored in your library automatically.

### Download Pandalive Recordings

Premium members can download any Pandalive recording as a video file. Free users can watch all recordings through the browser player.

### Free to Start

Sign up free and start following your favourite Pandalive creators.
about.afreecatv:
## AfreecaTV Creators on Stream Archive

AfreecaTV, recently rebranded as SOOP, has been the dominant Korean live streaming platform for years. From competitive gaming and esports to talk shows and mukbang, the platform hosts an enormous variety of content. But keeping up with your favourite AfreecaTV creators across time zones is nearly impossible. Stream Archive is an AfreecaTV recorder that captures every broadcast from the creators you follow, so you never miss a stream.

### Follow AfreecaTV Creators

Browse AfreecaTV creators already on Stream Archive. See their recent recordings, check their streaming patterns, and add them to your follow list with one click. Add any AfreecaTV creator by pasting their username, even if nobody else follows them yet.

### Automatic AfreecaTV Recording

The AfreecaTV recorder runs in the cloud around the clock. When a creator you follow goes live, recording begins automatically. When the broadcast ends, the recording appears in your library. No software to install, no manual intervention needed.

### Download AfreecaTV Recordings

Every AfreecaTV recording is available to watch instantly through the browser player. Premium users can download recordings as video files to watch offline.

### Free to Start

Create a free account and start following your favourite AfreecaTV creators today.
about.bigo:
## Bigo Creators on Stream Archive

Bigo Live is one of the most popular mobile-first live streaming platforms in the world, but it comes with a unique set of frustrations for anyone who wants to save content. Broadcasts vanish the moment they end with no replay option. And if you have tried screen capture apps, you have probably run into the infamous black screen problem. Bigo actively blocks screen recording tools, which means most APKs and overlay apps simply do not work.

Stream Archive sidesteps all of this. It is a Bigo live recorder that captures broadcasts directly from the server, completely bypassing screen capture. No black screen, no APK to install, no permissions to grant. Every Bigo Live from your followed creators is recorded in full quality and stored in your library.

### The Bigo Black Screen Problem, Solved

The black screen issue happens because Bigo's app detects screen capture overlays and blocks them. No amount of settings tweaking or APK sideloading reliably fixes it. Stream Archive does not use screen capture at all, so the black screen problem simply does not exist. Recordings are captured server-side in the cloud.

### Discover Bigo Creators

Browse Bigo creators already being recorded on Stream Archive. See their recent Lives, check how often they stream, and add them to your follow list. You can also add any Bigo creator by pasting their username.

### Download Bigo Live Recordings

Premium members can download any Bigo Live recording as a video file. Free users can watch all recordings through the browser player. Either way, your Bigo recordings are available indefinitely.

### Free to Start

Sign up free and start recording Bigo Lives right away. No screen capture, no black screen, no APK. Upgrade to premium to download Bigo live recordings.
about.tango:
## Tango Creators on Stream Archive

Tango is a social live streaming platform known for its interactive broadcasts and creator community. But like most live platforms, Tango does not keep recordings after a broadcast ends. Streams are live-only, which means if you miss someone's broadcast, there is no replay to fall back on.

Stream Archive is a Tango live recorder that solves this by capturing every broadcast from your followed creators automatically. Add a Tango creator once and every future stream is recorded in the cloud, stored in your library, and available to watch or download whenever you want.

### Follow Tango Creators

Browse Tango creators already on Stream Archive. See their recent recordings, discover new creators worth following, and add anyone by pasting their username. Your library grows automatically as they stream.

### Automatic Tango Stream Recording

The Tango live recorder runs in the cloud around the clock. When a creator you follow goes live, recording begins immediately. When the broadcast ends, the full recording appears in your library. No app on your phone, no browser extension, nothing to configure.

### Download Tango Live Recordings

Premium members can download Tango live recordings as video files for offline viewing. Save the streams that matter most and keep them permanently. Free users can watch all recordings through the browser player.

### Free to Start

Sign up free and add your favourite Tango creators. Their streams are recorded automatically from that moment on.
